trackResolution: bare filename -> music/<encoded>; absolute http(s) URLs used as-is
elevenlabsMusic: enabled as a build-time local generator via scripts/generate-eleven-music.mjs for Cars24 FM Originals
birthdayBlock: enabled as a build-time celebration generator via scripts/generate-birthday-block.mjs; supports birthdays and anniversaries at 10:00 AM IST once per day
businessUpdateBlock: enabled as a build-time Global Pulse generator via scripts/generate-business-update-block.mjs; airs once per day at 11:00 AM IST for a short post-update window
note: Source of truth is git, not any session report. Keep this file in sync with the index.html build label on every change.
